code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, String>
  Ok(a.copy(balance: a.balance + amount))
end

fn withdraw(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, String>
  if amount > a.balance
    Err("overdraft")
  else
    Ok(a.copy(balance: a.balance - amount))
  end
end

mut acc = Account(balance: 100)
mut status = "ok"

match deposit(acc, 50)
when Ok(a)
  acc = a
  status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(acc, 30)
when Ok(a)
  acc = a
  status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(acc, 500)
when Ok(a)
  acc = a
  status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  status = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{acc.balance}")
println("last_status=#{status}")
